name: single_key_default_sighash
provenance: Generated from deterministic libbitcoinpqc seed 0x20 plus the independent Rust P2MR serializer in contrib/testgen/p2mr_checksigpqc_vectors; the vector signs the manually computed P2MRSighash digest with libbitcoinpqc and does not use qbit wallet/signing/sighash helpers.
